message:
fix(cli): centralize TTY detection and use saturating_sub for timestamp math

Consolidate all is_terminal() checks through crate::output::is_tty()
and crate::output::is_stdin_tty() helper functions. In test builds,
these always return false to prevent tests from accidentally blocking
on interactive prompts or choosing TTY-specific output formats.

Replace bare arithmetic (now_us - timestamp) with saturating_sub across
all age/duration calculations in robot.rs to prevent underflow panics
when clocks drift or timestamps arrive from the future (e.g. during
cross-machine sync or NTP corrections).

Add diagnostic println! breadcrumbs to the archive_save_and_restore test
to aid debugging if it hangs in CI due to stdio capture deadlocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
